content: {"business_logic": "L\u00f3gica de negocio para CostSheetCardView.", "dependencies": ["@/components/ui/LazyRender", "sonner", "@/services/excel-service", "react", "framer-motion", "@/lib/utils", "@/store/cost-sheet-store", "@/types/cost-sheet", "@/components/ui/button", "@/components/ui/input", "./FormulaEditor", "@/components/ui/popover", "./CostSheetSectionActionsPanel", "./CircularProgress"], "domain": "UI", "exports": [], "id": "src/components/views/terminal/views/cost_sheet/CostSheetCardView.tsx", "name": "CostSheetCardView.tsx", "technical_description": "M\u00f3dulo t\u00e9cnico CostSheetCardView.", "user_description": "Gesti\u00f3n y c\u00e1lculo de fichas de costo para productos y servicios."}
